ogTitle: Brawboy vs Bray Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Brawboy and Bray Park.
heading: Brawboy vs Bray Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brawboy, New South Wales and Bray Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bray Park has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Brawboy (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brawboy or Bray Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brawboy has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Bray Park scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brawboy scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Bray Park scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brawboy or Bray Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bray Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
